bar_rungs.basis: rank-1 novelty survivor, 3014 stimulated DE genes, zero CollecTRI targets, absent from the standard T-cell annotation set
frontier replays at 0 drift against root_a8b0dcdd4024e12f
K562 DE is 1, arguing against a general-cell-line artifact. RPE1 is not_assayed context, not a failed rung, because the frozen RPE1 gwps comparator is sparse.
frozen PGGT1B snapshots include Shifrut, Schmidt, ORCS T-cell rows, STRING, DICE, GWAS Catalog, ChEMBL, Ensembl homology, and DepMap 19Q2

Shifrut 1107 supplies independent primary T-cell perturbation support. Schmidt cytokine output and Carnevale proliferation are retained as orthogonal_phenotype, not contradictions to a broad activation-transcriptome hypothesis.

PGGT1B encodes the beta subunit of geranylgeranyl transferase I. The current hypothesis is that perturbing this enzyme changes stimulated CD4+ activation by altering prenylation-dependent small-GTPase and immune-synapse traffic.
ChEMBL has target and activity rows for geranylgeranyl transferase type-1 subunit beta. This is a druggability hook, not a therapeutic claim.
adequate PGGT1B knockdown produces no candidate-specific activation-program shift at 8h or 48h, or the same effect appears in non-immune controls

frozen_sources.role: primary T-cell ORCS support and orthogonal screens

honest_ceiling: computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth

kill_attempts.basis: Marson records on-target stimulated knockdown and a large stimulated effect, but guide-level audit remains a strengthening item.
K562 DE is 1 and DepMap Achilles 19Q2 has median gene effect -0.1009 with 0 of 563 lines below -1.
Shifrut 1107 independently supports PGGT1B in primary T-cell perturbation context; Schmidt remains orthogonal_phenotype, not a contradiction.
The Marson perturbation effect is causal in this assay, and DICE expression does not by itself explain the signal as only a marker.
STRING and ChEMBL support the geranylgeranylation mechanism rather than an unrelated pathway node, while direct substrate-level biology remains wet-lab work.

why_not_discovery: No human key has accepted PGGT1B into frontier state.
This is computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth.
